engine.ladder_reasoning: The visitor is checking a physical eatery — the decision is driven by menu categories, branch locations, hours, and directions. Browsing photos/menu and finding a nearby branch IS the decision, so place beats quick-yes/thing.

goal.one_action: Order food online (redirect to delivery platforms) or find/visit a branch

structure.archetype_note: Restaurant microsite: home (offer + menu teaser + featured branches + contact), a menu category page that links out to ordering, and a full locations directory with maps/hours/directions.

mapped.observed_as: Our Food / Breakfast Items / Lunch and Dinner / Desserts / Beverages

unmapped.observed: Our Locations (branch cards with address, phone, hours, directions link + google-maps embeds)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section expresses a multi-branch location/hours/directions directory; it is the spine of a place site but sectionList has no map-hours/locations id.

unmapped.observed: JOIN OUR CIRCLE COMMUNITY (Kitopi loyalty/cashback app promo)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A loyalty-program/app enrollment promo is neither a standard feature block nor storeBadges (no app-store badge captured); it is a distinct offer type.

proposed_new.name: online-ordering-redirect
proposed_new.evidence: Every primary CTA ('ORDER NOW', 'Order from Circle Menu', 'Order from Supper Club Now', 'Order from Bakers Table Now') and the menu category cards hand off to third-party food-delivery/ordering platforms (Deliveroo and a link aggregator of several), with no on-site cart or prices. Distinct from external-booking-redirect (appointments) and from catalog (on-site browse).

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial — menu item detail/prices were never actually rendered (base64 placeholder noise), only inferred absent; section headings and structure were readable so classification is solid, but capped at medium per capture quality.

gap_findings: No canonical section for a multi-branch locations/hours/directions directory (a core place-site block).
map-hours capability exists in vocab but the taxonomy has no matching section id to place branch cards.

Restaurant online-ordering handoff to external delivery aggregators is not expressible in the closed capability vocab (only store-badges/catalog exist), motivating the proposed online-ordering-redirect.
Loyalty/rewards-app enrollment promo has no home in either the section list or capability vocab.
